abilities.name: Shackled Servitude
abilities.description: Within 6 yards of friendly Enforcer/Henchman/Master, gains + to attack flips.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Ignores other characters/terrain during movement. Reduce Ranged/Close Combat damage by half.

actions: (1) Spectral Claws (Martial Arts) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage. Crow Chill of Death: Target gains Chill of Death Condition until start of next turn (suffers - on Physical Aspect duels).
(0) Soulfire (Necromancy) | AV: 5C (10C) | Rg: 8 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage, then character fades away and is killed.
system.notes: Spirits bound to mortal realm by necromantic ritual. Denied passage to afterlife. Furious and enslaved. Rise from fallen Shieldbearers.
